title: Take Me Out
why_this_song: Take Me Out by Franz Ferdinand (2004) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "You know I'm here waiting for you"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I know I won't be leaving here"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I know I won't be leaving here"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I say, "Don't you know?""
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Don't move, time is slow"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "won't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "won't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You know I'm here waiting for you
If I move, this could die
If I wane, this could die

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Take Me Out", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Take Me Out", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Take Me Out" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Take Me Out" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Take Me Out" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Take Me Out", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
